title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI development efficiency, especially in team settings. The video advocates for TypeScript over Python due to better error detection through LSPs, type checking, and compile-time feedback mechanisms that reduce runtime mistakes.
